data.title: MIND CTI Expands European Footprint With $1.88M Aurenz Acquisition: Details
data.description: MIND C.T.I. acquires Aurenz GmbH for $1.88 million to enhance its UC analytics capabilities and expand its European market presence.

data.title: TSMC Powers Up: December Revenue Soars Ahead Of Q4 Earnings Release
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) prepares for Q4 earnings release amid strong momentum and revenue growth. Stock up 7.91% in past month, bullish outlook.

data.title: Consumer Inflation Worries Highest Since 2008, U Of M Survey Says: Wall Street Tumbles To 2-Month Lows
data.description: US consumers' long-term inflation expectations hit highest level since 2008, raising concerns over Fed's ability to control prices.

data.title: Why Constellation Energy Shares Are Surging On Friday?
data.description: The $16.4 billion merger between Constellation Energy (NASDAQ: CEG) and Calpine Corp. will integrate Constellation's nuclear assets with Calpine's geothermal and natural gas plants.

data.title: How Is The Market Feeling About Digital Realty Trust?
